subcodes.first_line: Wouldst Thou bar, O my God, from the sanctuary of Thine Essence one who hath turned towards Thee? Wouldst Thou banish, O my Beloved, one who hath sought refuge in Thy celestial city [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ا تحرم یا الهی من اقبل الی حرم ذاتک ا تبعد یا محبوبی من استجار الی مدینه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
